query:
UPDATE events
        SET 
            title = COALESCE($1, title),
            description_event = COALESCE($2, description_event),
            start_date_time = COALESCE($3, start_date_time),
            end_date_time = COALESCE($4, end_date_time),
            color = COALESCE($5, color),
            location = COALESCE($6, location)
        WHERE event_id = $7
